context: Lil Nas X's 'Old Town Road' shattered the record for longest-running #1 at 19 weeks, blurring genre lines between country and hip-hop while sparking a Billboard classification debate. Post Malone landed three songs in the top ten, Billie Eilish became Gen Z's first breakout superstar with 'bad guy,' and the Jonas Brothers staged a comeback that nobody saw coming.

tracks.title: Old Town Road
tracks.artist: Lil Nas X ft. Billy Ray Cyrus
